title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. jaccardii
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. jaccardii is a subspecies of the common hawkweed plant, characterized by its yellow flowers and rosette of leaves. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. jaccardii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
